LanguageData.Marshal_MountedTurret.description: A small machine gun mounted on a marshal tank. Needs to be reloaded with steel. Can only fire over short range, but doesn’t have any issues with firing at enemies that engage the vehicle in melee.
LanguageData.Marshal_MountedTurret.fireModes.0.label: burst
LanguageData.Marshal_MountedTurret.label: mounted turret
